title: Concurrent Worker Pool
description: Implement a worker pool pattern in Go using goroutines and channels. The pool should process jobs concurrently with configurable number of workers.
requirements: Accept numWorkers int and bufferSize int parameters
Return a WorkerPool struct with Submit and Wait methods
Submit should accept a func() interface{} job
Use buffered channels for job queue
Results should be collectible via Results() method

few_shot_examples.prompt: Implement a simple goroutine that processes items from a channel.
Implement a function that runs multiple goroutines and waits for completion.
